reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion en la estacion de servicio, la cajera y el chico que hace los cafes ambos super amables y atentos, el baño impecable y hay una persona limpiando a cada rato.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the gas station, the cashier and the guy who makes the coffees are both super friendly and attentive, the bathroom is spotless and there is a person cleaning constantly.

reviews.comment:
Atención en slow motion, la semana pasada tomaron 45 minutos de demora para la carga de combustible aduciendo cambio de turno.
El restoran cierra a las 10pm, adoptó el horario de EEUU

(Translated by Google)
Attention in slow motion: last week there was a 45-minute delay for refueling, citing a shift change.
The restaurant closes at 10 pm; it's on US time.
